rani_lakshmibai_of_jhansi.ref_desc: Rani Lakshmibai appears as a mid-20s athletic Maratha queen with a heart-shaped wheatish face, long braided black hair under a deep saffron nauvari sari, dark indigo choli, brown leather belts and boots, minimal gold jewellery, and a steel talwar in a brown scabbard.

chhatrapati_shivaji_maharaj.ref_desc: Shivaji Maharaj is a mid-30s compact warrior with wheatish skin, pointed black beard, white turban, white angarkha, off-white trousers, saffron sash, dark green sleeveless waistcoat, brown mojari shoes, and a steel talwar at his left hip with white, saffron, dark green, brown, and gold accents.

emperor_ashoka.ref_desc: Emperor Ashoka appears as a mid-30s broad-shouldered Mauryan ruler with an oval bearded face, black topknot and simple gold circlet, deep red tunic, off-white dhoti, pale saffron shawl, minimal gold jewellery, brown sandals, and a plain curved sword at his left hip.

rajendra_chola_i.ref_desc: Rajendra Chola I is a tall, medium-brown warrior-king with a high black topknot, gold forehead chain, deep-red angavastram, white veshti with gold border, gold ornaments, leather sandals, and a curved Chola steel sword in a dark brown scabbard, using red, white, gold, brown, and black tones.

tatya_tope.ref_desc: Tatya Tope is a lean mid-30s Maratha general with wheatish skin, sharp features, a prominent moustache, black hair under an off-white turban, wearing an off-white angarkha and dhoti with a maroon sash and beige shawl, carrying a brass-hilted talwar in a brown scabbard.

british_cavalry_officer_1858.ref_desc: A lean late-twenties British hussar officer with dark side-whiskers, short dark brown hair under a navy forage cap, wearing a dark blue gold-braided hussar tunic, blue breeches with gold stripe, black riding boots, and a brass-hilted sabre at his left hip.

sir_hugh_rose.ref_desc: Sir Hugh Rose is a stern blue-grey-eyed British general with receding grey hair under a dark navy peaked cap, wearing a dark navy frock coat with scarlet piping, khaki trousers, black boots, a brown sword belt, and carrying a brass-guard 1822 officer’s sword in a steel scabbard, with navy, scarlet, khaki, black, and brass tones.

mahipala_the_pala_king.ref_desc: Mahipala is a tall, broad-shouldered, early-40s Pala king with medium-brown skin, black hair in a high topknot held by a gold circlet, maroon silk tunic, gold-yellow over-tunic, off-white dhoti, green shawl, gold jewellery, sandals, and a curved sword in a brown scabbard with red-wrapped hilt.

aurangzeb_the_mughal_emperor.ref_desc: Aurangzeb Alamgir is a tall, lean, late-40s Mughal emperor with a narrow bearded face and stern dark eyes, wearing a white conical turban with green band, ivory patterned jama, maroon quilted waistcoat, emerald-green sash, dark churidar and mojari, and carrying a plain-hilted talwar in a brown scabbard with an ivory–green–maroon–gold–brown palette.

hiroji_farzand.ref_desc: Hiroji Farzand is a lean mid-20s Maratha with wheatish complexion, short moustache and small beard, saffron pagri over a low hair-knot, off-white angarkha, bottle-green quilted sleeveless waistcoat, cream churidar, brown mojari and a plain dark-brown-sheathed talwar on a red-and-gold sash.

mangal_pandey.ref_desc: Mangal Pandey is a lean mid-20s sepoy with an oval medium-brown face, dark intense eyes, black hair in a low bun with loose temples, wearing an off-white kurta under a red Bengal Infantry coatee, white churidar trousers, dark blue sash, brown boots, and carrying a long Brown Bess-style flintlock musket with fixed bayonet in a palette of deep red, off-white, dark blue, brown leather, and brass.

bahadur_shah_zafar.ref_desc: Elderly, thin Bahadur Shah Zafar with a long wrinkled face, white mustache and beard, wearing a deep green silk Mughal jama, cream churidar and shawl, brown mojari shoes, a tall crimson turban with a green jewel, and a plain leather-sheathed shamshir at his left side.

kunwar_singh.ref_desc: Elder Kunwar Singh has an oval weathered brown face with grey mustache and beard, long grey hair in a low knot under an off‑white turban, wearing an off‑white angarkha, olive quilted sleeveless coat, white churidar, dark maroon sash, brown mojari, right forearm bandage, and a curved talwar in a dark brown scabbard at his left side with off‑white, dark maroon, olive green, dark brown and beige colours.

bal_gangadhar_tilak.ref_desc: Bal Gangadhar Tilak is a medium-built late-middle-aged Maharashtrian man with a calm, intense face, black-grey mustache, deep-set eyes, wearing a red Puneri pagadi, off-white kurta and dhoti, dark indigo shawl, brown chappals, and carrying a brown leather notebook with pen.

lala_lajpat_rai.ref_desc: Lala Lajpat Rai is a medium-built, sixtyish man with a mustard-cream khadi turban, oval medium-brown face with a grey-black moustache, off-white kurta and churidar under a beige angarkha coat, a deep charcoal-brown shawl with maroon-striped border, brown leather shoes, and a rolled Tribune newspaper in his right hand.

bagha_jatin_jatindranath_mukherjee.ref_desc: Bagha Jatin is a tall, broad-shouldered man in his early 30s with medium-brown skin, short black hair combed back, a neat moustache, wearing an off-white khadi kurta, beige dhoti, simple sandals, a light gamchha, and carrying a dark-wood bolt-action rifle on a brown strap.

khudiram_bose.ref_desc: Khudiram Bose is a slim 17-year-old Bengali youth with short slightly wavy black hair, medium-brown skin, large determined dark eyes, wearing an off-white khadi kurta, cream Bengali-style dhoti with a thin maroon border, light-brown gamchha over his left shoulder, bare feet, and a brown leather cross-body satchel with a brass buckle and a wrapped paper packet protruding, in a palette of off-white, cream, light brown, maroon, and black.

rajaraja_chola_i.ref_desc: Rajaraja Chola I is a tall, muscular, medium-brown man with an oval face, arched brows, ash-and-red tilak, long black hair in a high topknot with a gold circlet and white tie, wearing a deep-maroon angavastra, cream veshti with maroon-gold border, simple gold ornaments, brown sandals, and carrying a plain curved steel sword with wooden hilt in a brown leather scabbard, with maroon, cream, gold, dark brown and black as dominant colours.

ainnurruvar_manigramam_merchant_guilds_a.figure: Ainnurruvar/Manigramam merchant guilds and Chola-era trade
ainnurruvar_manigramam_merchant_guilds_a.ref_desc: A lean Tamil merchant in his early 40s with an oval medium-brown face, short beard, low-knot black hair and simple off-white turban strip, wearing maroon angavastram, off-white tunic, cream veshti, dark indigo waist-sash, leather sandals, modest gold and bead jewellery, carrying a curved iron merchant’s scale and palm-leaf ledger in maroon, off-white, cream, dark indigo and dark brown tones.

chola_bronze_artisans_and_temple_patrons.figure: Chola bronze artisans and temple patrons
chola_bronze_artisans_and_temple_patrons.ref_desc: Manikkam of Thanjai is a lean late-20s Chola bronze artisan with warm medium-brown skin, oval face, center-parted black hair in a low bun under an ochre headband, wearing an off-white veshti with deep-maroon border, reddish-brown angavastram, minimal copper and bronze ornaments, and carrying a soot-darkened bronze pouring ladle and a small wax dancing-deity model in warm bronze tones.

chola_local_self_governance.ref_desc: A mid-20s medium-brown Tamil man with an oval face, small ash tilaka, black hair in a back kudumi, wearing an off-white ankle-length veshti with ochre border and cream angavastram with maroon stripe, bare feet, gold ear studs, and carrying palm-leaf manuscripts with an iron stylus.

karikala_chola.ref_desc: Karikala Chola is a mid-30s tall, lean Tamil king with a medium-brown complexion, scar on his right temple, high black warrior-knot with a gold band and jasmine string, bare chest with off-white angavastram, mustard-yellow silk vashti with maroon borders, copper and gold ornaments, dark-brown sandals, and a plain curved iron sword in a brown leather scabbard at his right hip in a mustard, maroon, off-white, dark brown and gold palette.

vijayalaya_chola.ref_desc: Vijayalaya Chola is a medium-brown, oval-faced Tamil king in his early 40s with a neat tapered moustache, high black kudumi topknot, narrow gold forehead band, wearing a dark maroon angavastram over off-white upper cloth, deep indigo gold-bordered veshti, simple gold jewellery, leather bracers and sandals, and carrying a plain curved iron sword in a dark brown leather scabbard, with a palette of maroon, indigo, off-white, gold, and dark brown.

kunjaramallan_the_temple_s_architect.ref_desc: Kunjaramallan is a lean, medium-brown, bearded Chola architect with a low black kudumi and white headband, wearing an off-white angavastram and veshti with brick-red border, copper and rudraksha bracelets, carrying a dark-brown teak architect’s staff with brass ends and palm-leaf plans.

kundavai_pirati.ref_desc: Kundavai Pirati is a late-20s Chola princess with a warm medium-brown oval face, large kohl-lined eyes, long black hair in a gold-ribboned braid under a narrow gold circlet, wearing a deep maroon silk sari with gold border, layered gold jewellery and kamarbandh, and carrying a rolled palm-leaf manuscript with a small bronze oil lamp, in a palette of deep maroon, gold, muted red, earthy brown and black.

kulottunga_chola_i.ref_desc: Kulottunga Chola I is a tall, medium-brown skinned emperor with an oval face, neat moustache, high black kudumi with a plain gold circlet, bare upper body with off-white angavastram, deep-red silk dhoti, gold waistbelt and armlets, brown sandals, and a curved steel sword in a dark-brown leather scabbard at his left hip accented by gold and deep-red tones.

kambar.ref_desc: Kambar is a medium-brown Tamil man in his late 30s with an oval face, black hair tied in a low knot with an off-white headband, wearing an off-white veshti with dark maroon border, cotton angavastram with gold stripe, simple beads and ash marks, and carrying a bound palm-leaf Ramayanam bundle with wooden stylus.

ashfaqulla_khan_and_ram_prasad_bismil.figure: Ashfaqulla Khan and Ram Prasad Bismil
ashfaqulla_khan_and_ram_prasad_bismil.ref_desc: Ashfaq is a lean mid‑20s man with an oval wheatish face, narrow moustache, short side‑parted black hair under a white Gandhi cap, in off‑white kurta‑pyjama with brown waistcoat and sandals, beside Bismil, a slightly broader fair‑wheatish man with a squarer face, straight moustache, short brushed‑back hair, in off‑white kurta‑pyjama, light‑grey waistcoat, off‑white angavastram and black shoes, and they share a worn brown leather shoulder satchel of papers in an off‑white, light‑brown, dark‑brown, light‑grey and black palette.

rani_abbakka_chowta.ref_desc: Rani Abbakka Chowta is a late-20s athletic woman with a medium-brown oval face, sharp dark eyes, black hair in a low bun under a deep-red headscarf, wearing a deep indigo kachche-draped sari with burnt-orange border, coconut-brown sleeveless war-vest, minimal brass-gold jewellery, bare feet with anklets, and carrying a simple brass-hilted tulwar with leather back-scabbard in a deep indigo, burnt orange, coconut brown, brass gold, and dark brown leather palette.

king_porus_puru.ref_desc: King Porus is a tall broad-shouldered warrior-king with medium-brown skin, long black hair in a low knot under a bronze conical helmet with crimson wrap, wearing an indigo quilted vest, bronze scale cuirass, off-white tunic and trousers, mustard-ochre cloak, crimson sash, and carrying a straight bronze-hilted sword in a brown scabbard.

bhagat_singh.ref_desc: Bhagat Singh is a lean early-twenties man with a light-brown oval face, thin mustache, short black hair under a tilted light-brown fedora, wearing an off-white kurta, dark-brown woolen coat, off-white trousers, dark-brown shoes, and carrying a brown notebook with a pen.

velu_nachiyar_and_kuyili.ref_desc: Velu Nachiyar is a warm-brown, sharp-eyed queen in a deep maroon madisar sari over a dark green blouse with an indigo quilted armour vest, jasmine-wrapped braid, minimal gold jewellery and a curved tulwar, beside Kuyili, a scarred, fierce warm-brown soldier in dull brown and off-white cotton wraps with a tight low bun, cloth-bound feet, and a rope-slung clay oil-pot and flint striker, all in maroon, indigo, dark green, earthy brown and cream tones.

chandragupta_i.ref_desc: Chandragupta I the First is a mid-30s athletic North Indian king with medium-brown skin, oval face, short beard, black hair in a low topknot under a narrow gold circlet, wearing an off-white diagonal uttariya, reddish-maroon patterned dhoti, simple gold jewellery, leather sandals, and carrying a slightly curved iron sword with a plain bronze hilt in a brown scabbard, accented by off-white, reddish-maroon, gold, and dark tones.

samudragupta.ref_desc: Samudragupta is a lean mid-30s Gupta king with warm medium-brown skin, an oval face with a small tilak, black hair in a low topknot under a plain gold circlet, wearing an off-white gold-bordered uttarīya, deep red gold-bordered dhoti, simple gold ornaments, brown sandals, and carrying a dark wooden recurve bow together with an unstrung dark-brown veena, in a palette of deep red, off-white, gold, warm brown skin and dark wood.

chandragupta_ii_vikramaditya.ref_desc: Chandragupta II Vikramaditya is a medium-built, early-30s Gupta emperor with an oval medium-brown face, short moustache, black hair in a low topknot under a narrow gold circlet, wearing a deep maroon sleeveless silk tunic, saffron sash, off-white bordered dhoti, gold ornaments, brown sandals, and holding a Gupta-style silver coin.

prabhavatigupta.ref_desc: Prabhāvatīgupta is a light-brown, oval-faced woman in her early thirties with large dark brown eyes, black hair in a high rounded bun with side-locks and a gold forehead ornament, wearing a deep maroon Gupta-Vakataka sari with muted gold choli and gold jewelry, holding a rectangular copper-plate grant bound with a sealed ring, in a palette of deep maroon, muted gold, warm brown, black and soft red.

faxian_the_pilgrim.ref_desc: Faxian is a mid-40s lean Chinese monk with a tanned oval face, shaved stubble hair and white headband, wearing a cream inner robe, saffron-ochre patchwork kāṣāya, dark grey-blue trousers, brown travel boots, scroll case and beads, carrying a bamboo staff with red-tied bells.

aryabhata.ref_desc: Young lean Āryabhaṭa with medium‑brown oval face, compact black topknot, red sandal tilak, off‑white uttarīya over a cream dhoti with deep‑indigo hem stripe, wooden mala, copper armlet, leather sandals, and a tied palm‑leaf Aryabhatiya manuscript with dark‑wood gnomon, in off‑white, maroon and indigo tones.

brahmagupta.ref_desc: Brahmagupta is a lean, medium-brown man of about 35 with an oval high-foreheaded face, neat moustache, dark hair tied in a low knot under a cream uttariya hood, wearing an off-white dhoti with deep-red border and subtle-checked shawl, carrying a birch-bark manuscript bundle with dot numerals and a reed stylus, in off-white, deep red, indigo, pale ochre and dark brown tones.

the_master_smith_of_the_iron_pillar.display_name: The Master Smith of the Iron Pillar
the_master_smith_of_the_iron_pillar.figure: The Master Smith of the Iron Pillar
the_master_smith_of_the_iron_pillar.ref_desc: A lean Gupta-era ironsmith in an off-white dhoti with dark-red sash, bare torso under a soot-stained dark-brown leather apron, black hair in a short topknot with a brown headband, iron-grey sledgehammer in hand, brown sandals, and accents of indigo cloth.

sushruta_the_surgeon.ref_desc: Sushruta is a lean, mid-30s Kashi surgeon with medium-brown skin, an oval face, short beard, black hair in a small topknot with a white forehead band, wearing an off-white angarkha, off-white dhoti, pale-ochre shawl, leather sandals, copper bangle, carrying a curved iron surgical knife in a back-waist sheath and a palm-leaf manuscript, in off-white, pale ochre, dark brown and leather-brown tones.

kumaragupta_i.ref_desc: Kumaragupta the First is a tall, athletic, medium-brown man with an oval face, red tilak, black hair in a high topknot under a simple gold circlet, wearing a white angarakha, deep-red dhoti, mustard-yellow shawl, modest gold jewellery, brown belt, and carrying a sheathed straight iron sword at his left hip while holding a rolled palm-leaf manuscript, all in white, deep red, mustard yellow, dull gold, and brown leather tones.

kalidasa.ref_desc: Kālidāsa is a lean, medium-brown man of about 30 with an oval face, calm dark eyes, black hair in a low knot with a cream headband, wearing an off-white shawl over a saffron dhoti and brown sandals, carrying an indigo-wrapped palm-leaf manuscript tied with a red cord.

the_master_sculptor_of_the_gupta_age.display_name: The Master Sculptor of the Gupta Age
the_master_sculptor_of_the_gupta_age.figure: The Master Sculptor of the Gupta Age
the_master_sculptor_of_the_gupta_age.ref_desc: A lean, medium-brown Gupta-age sculptor with an oval face, topknot and white headband, wearing an off-white angavastra over a white dhoti with a reddish-brown border, small gold hoops, copper bangle, brown sandals, and carrying a dark-handled iron hammer with a chisel at his belt in warm off-white and brown tones.

skandagupta.ref_desc: Skandagupta is a medium-brown, strong-jawed North Indian man in his early 30s with a high black topknot and gold fillet, wearing a deep red angarkha, indigo waistcoat, white-gold dhoti, cream uttariya, minimal gold jewellery, and carrying a long curved iron sword in a brown leather scabbard.

chandragupta_maurya.ref_desc: Chandragupta Maurya is a tall, athletic late-20s man with medium-brown skin, strong jaw, scar over his right eyebrow, long black hair in a low warrior’s knot with a plain gold headband, wearing a deep indigo sleeveless vest, off-white dhoti with dark-red sash, minimal dull-gold jewellery, brown bracers and sandals, and carrying a simple iron straight sword at his left hip with a brown leather scabbard and deep-maroon shawl pushed back.

kautilya_chanakya.ref_desc: Kautilya is a mid-40s lean, medium-brown man with an oval face, intense narrow eyes, a long braided shikha, off-white dhoti, saffron-ochre uttariya, sacred thread, simple sandals, a copper bangle, and a rolled palm-leaf Arthashastra manuscript bundle bound with dark cord.

megasthenes.ref_desc: Megasthenes is a mid-30s lean Greek man with tanned oval face, short wavy dark hair, trimmed beard, wearing an off-white knee-length chiton, indigo himation, leather sandals, indigo kausia at his belt, and a brown-strapped wooden papyrus scroll case, in off-white, indigo, tan and dark brown tones.

bindusara.ref_desc: Bindusara Amitraghata is a tall, solidly built late-30s Mauryan king with an oval medium-brown face, small bindu birthmark at his right temple, black hair in a high topknot with a gold headband, wearing a white angarakha over deep indigo dhoti, saffron-ochre uttariya, minimal gold jewellery, brown sandals, and carrying a lotus-tipped dark-wood iron-staff, in a white, deep indigo, saffron-ochre, maroon, and dull-gold palette.

ashoka.ref_desc: Ashoka is a tall, broad-shouldered, medium-brown man in his late 30s with an oval face, short black hair brushed back, neat beard, a plain gold circlet, wearing an ivory uttariya over a deep maroon antariya with golden-yellow borders, minimal gold jewellery, brown sandals, and carrying a palm-leaf manuscript bundle with stylus and a slender carved wooden staff in a palette of ivory, deep maroon, golden yellow, light ochre, and dark brown.

james_prinsep.ref_desc: James Prinsep is a slim late-20s man with a fair sunburned oval face, chestnut side-parted hair with mutton-chop sideburns, wearing a cream waistcoat, white rolled-sleeve shirt, dusty-blue tailcoat, dark-brown trousers, a loose dark-green cravat, and holding a twine-bound leather notebook with Brahmi notes and a palm-leaf manuscript, in a cream, white, dusty blue, dark brown, and dark green palette.

mahinda_and_sanghamitra.ref_desc: Mahinda is a lean, medium-brown, shaven-headed monk in saffron-ochre Mauryan robes with a palm-leaf manuscript bundle, and Sanghamitta is a serene, medium-brown nun in pale yellow and saffron robes with a white headwrap carrying an earthen pot holding a green Bodhi sapling.

ashoka_and_dasharatha_maurya.ref_desc: Ashoka and Dasharatha appear together: square-jawed scarred Ashoka with close-cropped hair, gold diadem, indigo tunic, cream dhoti and lion-capped staff beside earnest Dasharatha with low bun, bronze band, brick-red tunic, off-white dhoti and palm-leaf document bundle in indigo, saffron, cream and brown tones.

brihadratha_maurya_and_pushyamitra_shung.ref_desc: Brihadratha and Pushyamitra stand together, Brihadratha in deep indigo antariya and cream uttariya with gold circlet and manuscript bundle, Pushyamitra in earthy red-brown antariya, dark olive tunic, red cloth hair band and iron sword at his hip.

the_didarganj_yakshi.ref_desc: Didarganj Yakshi appears as a serene medium-brown oval-faced woman with a central forelock curl and low bun, robed in cream-beige draped garments with gold jewellery and earthy red sash, holding a long chauri with off-white plume in a warm sandstone-beige, gold and dark brown palette.

harihara_i_and_bukka_raya_i.figure: Harihara I and Bukka Raya I
harihara_i_and_bukka_raya_i.ref_desc: Harihara I has an oval medium-brown face with a neat moustache, short-knotted black hair and gold headband, cream tunic, maroon dhoti, dark green quilted vest, saffron-ochre shawl, simple gold jewelry, and a sheathed steel sword with brown scabbard and brass fittings.

the_city_of_hampi.ref_desc: Hampi’s spirit appears as a medium-brown, oval-faced young guardian with a high black braid and gold-edged turban band, in off-white angavastra, maroon blouse, mustard-ochre dhoti, blue waist-sash and bronze bangles, carrying a palm-leaf city map and wooden measuring staff.

kamalapura_tank_and_the_bukka_aqueduct.figure: Kamalapura Tank and the Bukka Aqueduct
kamalapura_tank_and_the_bukka_aqueduct.ref_desc: A lean, medium-brown Vijayanagara water engineer with an indigo angarakha over a cream dhoti, black hair in a short knot and headband, copper bangles, leather sandals, and a wooden measuring staff plus palm-leaf plans at his belt in indigo, cream and brown tones.

krishnadevaraya.ref_desc: Krishnadevaraya appears as a late-30s, medium-brown, broad-shouldered South Indian king with a maroon gold-crowned turban, maroon silk jamā, olive war-vest, indigo churidar, cream sash, gold belt and jewelry, wielding a ruby-hilted talwar in a brown scabbard with a deep maroon, olive, indigo, cream and gold palette.

vittala_temple_craftsmen.ref_desc: A mid-30s Vittala Temple craftsman with medium-brown oval face, black topknot and off-white headband, wearing a sandalwood beige angarkha, off-white panchakachcha dhoti, reddish-brown waist sash, simple sandals, and carrying a steel chisel with stone hammer in muted earthy tones.

paes_nunes_abdur_razzaq_and_nicolo_de_co.figure: Paes, Nunes, Abdur Razzaq and Nicolo de' Conti
paes_nunes_abdur_razzaq_and_nicolo_de_co.ref_desc: A mid-30s lean bearded traveller with shoulder-length dark brown hair and headband, wearing an indigo jama-coat over cream tunic, sand-brown trousers, russet-red shoulder shawl and dark leather boots, carrying a strapped leather notebook and reed pen in a warm indigo-brown palette.

vijayanagara_merchants.ref_desc: A mid-30s Vijayanagara merchant with medium-brown oval face, black tied-back hair under an off-white headcloth, off-white tunic, indigo dhoti with marigold and brick-red border, brown leather vest and sandals, carrying a dark teakwood chest of gold varaha coins and a palm-leaf ledger.

amara_nayakas.ref_desc: An athletic early-30s South Indian amara-nayaka with medium brown skin, black hair in a knot under a deep-red gold-trimmed turban, indigo quilted war-jacket, cream tunic, brown trousers, dark leather boots and belts, bearing a curved talwar and palm-leaf records in crimson and earthy tones.

aliya_rama_raya.ref_desc: Aliya Rama Raya is a tall, broad-shouldered, late-middle-aged South Indian man with a medium-brown complexion, grey-streaked shoulder-length hair tied back, maroon turban, deep-red angarakha, cream trousers, green waist sash, off-white gold-bordered anga-vastram, simple regal jewellery, steel breastplate, and a curved steel sword with red scabbard at his left hip.

purandara_dasa.ref_desc: Purandara Dasa is a lean, medium-brown, middle-aged Haridasa with short grey-streaked hair in a small knot, Madhva tilaka, off-white kurta, white dhoti, saffron and maroon cotton drapes, tulasi malas, paduka sandals, and a tall tan-brown jackwood tambura.

tenali_ramakrishna.ref_desc: Tenali Ramakrishna is a lean mid-30s Telugu poet with medium-brown skin, oiled black hair in a small bun, Vaishnava tilak, off-white angavastram, cream dhoti with mustard border, simple beads, brown sandals, and a palm-leaf manuscript bundle with reed stylus in maroon and mustard tones.

hampi_and_the_aravidu_heirs.ref_desc: Tirumala Deva Raya is a tall, medium-brown man with an oval face, pointed beard, high knot under a crimson kulah cap, wearing a deep-green silk angarkha, maroon quilted coat, saffron sash, white paijama, stone-grey shawl, and bearing a brass-inlaid talwar with rolled map.

mehrgarh_farmers.ref_desc: Mehrgarh Farmer-Healer is a lean, sun-browned young adult with dark almond eyes, low ponytailed dark hair and cloth headband, wearing an off-white tunic, ochre shawl, earth-brown wrap skirt, bead necklace, sandals, and carrying a tall reddish-brown digging stick with a small pouch.

harappan_city_builders.ref_desc: Harappan City Builder with medium-brown oval face, low black hair knot with copper headband, off-white waistcloth, taupe draped upper cloth, light-ochre sleeveless vest, brown sandals, simple copper and bead jewellery, and a rectangular wooden measuring rod with cord in warm neutral colours.

harappan_civic_councils.ref_desc: A mature Harappan civic councillor with an oval medium-brown face, short black hair in a neat back knot and slim headband, brick-red checked shawl over ivory dhoti, modest stone and bronze jewellery, dark sandals, and a dark-grey unicorn seal with small bronze balance at his waist.

mohenjo_daro_engineers.ref_desc: A mid-20s Mohenjo-daro engineer with medium-brown skin, black hair in a low knot with a copper head-ring, off-white tunic, brick-red shoulder shawl, brown wrapped skirt, leather sandals, simple bead and copper jewelry, carrying a wooden L-shaped measuring staff and a clay plan tablet.

harappan_sanitation_workers.ref_desc: A lean mid-20s Harappan sanitation worker with medium-brown skin, black topknot and cloth headband, wearing beige dhoti, clay-ochre tunic, indigo-striped shawl, leather sandals, minimal copper and steatite jewellery, carrying a wooden drain-rod with bronze scraping blade in a beige, clay and indigo palette.

dholavira_water_engineers.ref_desc: A lean, mid-30s Dholavira water engineer with tanned medium-brown skin, dark hair in a low knot with an off-white headband, wearing an indigo sleeveless tunic over off-white garments and dhoti with simple sandals, carrying a clay tablet planner in muted earth tones.

harappan_bead_makers.ref_desc: A mid-20s Harappan bead maker with oval medium-brown face, black hair in a low bun, off-white tunic, terracotta dhoti, carnelian necklace, bronze wrist bangle, and leather sandals, holding a stone drill-board and bow-mounted chert micro-drill in deep carnelian-orange, brown, and off-white tones.

harappan_weighmasters.ref_desc: Harappan Weighmaster with oval medium-brown face, trimmed short beard, tied-back black hair and linen headband, wearing terracotta tunic, off-white dhoti, cream shawl with indigo border, leather sandals, shell necklace, copper bangle, and holding a stone balance scale with chert weights.

harappan_sea_traders.ref_desc: Harappan Sea Trader of Lothal is a lean, mid-20s Meluhhan sailor with medium-brown skin, black topknot, off-white kilt, pale tan mantle, indigo sash, brown sandals, carnelian bead and hanging seal on a cord, and copper bangle in a muted natural palette.

harappan_seal_cutters.ref_desc: A lean mid-20s Harappan seal cutter with medium-brown skin, low black hair bun and cord headband, in an off-white tunic, brown dhoti with dark indigo border, dusty-terracotta shawl and simple beads, holding a small square unicorn steatite seal with copper chisel and burnisher.

indus_script_scholars.ref_desc: A focused early-30s Indus script scholar with light-brown skin, short wavy black hair, glasses, a cream cotton kurta, dark-navy chinos, brown leather shoes, maroon stole, and a brown canvas messenger bag full of replica Indus seals and a laptop.

harappan_artists.ref_desc: Harappan Artist of Mohenjo-daro is a mid-20s lean craftsperson with medium-brown complexion, dark hair in a low bun and cord headband, wearing off-white wrap, terracotta shawl, indigo skirt, copper bangles, and holding a clay tray of miniatures with a bronze stylus.
